posts.text:
Try Grok Voice for enterprise


Mario Nawfal (@MarioNawfal)

Grok Voice Agent is crushing it as one of the top voice AIs out there.

It ranks #2 on Big Bench Audio with a massive 92.9% on speech reasoning, showing insane accuracy in understanding and responding to spoken language.

Source: @XFreeze





— https://nitter.net/MarioNawfal/status/2035284026521468980#m
I would like to offer to pay the salaries of TSA personnel during this funding impasse that is negatively affecting the lives of so many Americans at airports throughout the country

Trust Grok


The Rabbit Hole (@TheRabbitHole)

Grok passes the Caitlyn Jenner AI Test.

Claude Fails.





— https://nitter.net/TheRabbitHole/status/2035221159365812380#m

Coming out soon


Mark Kretschmann (@mark_k)

"Grok Computer" coming from @xai

Supposedly a computer-use agent? That's my guess. So basically like a taste of Macrohard.

🔥🔥





— https://nitter.net/mark_k/status/2035069095389904911#m

SpaceXAI will offer a Multipass


Elon Musk (@elonmusk)



Video
  





— https://nitter.net/elonmusk/status/2035301419738366135#m
